segments.text: Bair won't let them recover! If the edgeguard fails, there's the ledge.
segments.original_text: 上がらせない空中後ろ 復帰阻止がダメなら崖でっていうね

segments.text: Crouching to avoid the float? Tough situation. Miya keeps grinding away at the health steadily!
segments.original_text: しゃがんで浮遊を避けたかまさか ミュートエース苦しい展開ガリガリと体力を削ってくるMiyaの主力

segments.text: Nair that denies the forward dodge. The way that move comes out... bair into down smash, punish from above!
segments.original_text: 空N 前回避も許さないその技の振り方 空中後ろ下スマッシュ上から差し返す

segments.text: Getup attack connects, the mixup game goes on! Sees the bucket, throws the turnip!
segments.original_text: 攻撃上がり通して読み合いが回る バケツを見てからカブを投げたのかまさか

segments.text: Grab and out! Miya's pressure strikes again!
segments.original_text: 掴んでさあ外に出す ミーヤーのプレッシャー再び

segments.text: The follow-up is clean though! That getup attack, the positioning was spot on there!
segments.original_text: ただ継続はうまいですね 攻撃上がりですね アドリブのシェフの位置だったので

segments.text: So fast! Way too good, that jab! Of course you're shielding! Who could even dodge that?
segments.original_text: 早いです 優秀すぎる弱1段 そりゃガード張りますよ 誰が避けれるのか
ゲムヲの空中後ろがまだまだ続いて

full_text: Bair won't let them recover! If the edgeguard fails, there's the ledge. Crouching to avoid the float? Tough situation. Miya keeps grinding away at the health steadily! Nair that denies the forward dodge. The way that move comes out... bair into down smash, punish from above! Getup attack connects, the mixup game goes on! Sees the bucket, throws the turnip! Grab and out! Miya's pressure strikes again! The follow-up is clean though! That getup attack, the positioning was spot on there! So fast! Way too good, that jab! Of course you're shielding! Who could even dodge that? Gemwou's bair just keeps coming!

corrections.rule: Move: 空中しろ→空中後ろ(空後)

corrections.original: 復帰としてがダメなら
corrections.rule: Smash term: 復帰として→復帰阻止
Player name: ミーヤー→Miya; homophone: 主役→主力

corrections.original: クエネ前回秘も許さない
corrections.corrected: 空N 前回避も許さない
corrections.rule: Move: クエネ→空N; homophone: 回秘→回避

corrections.original: 空中しろ下スマッシュ
corrections.corrected: 空中後ろ下スマッシュ
corrections.rule: Move: 空中しろ→空中後ろ
Mishearing: 優勝するエビ→優秀すぎる; 弾→段
Character name: ゲンダム→ゲムヲ(Mr. Game & Watch); Move: 空中しろ→空中後ろ
